scripts.smoke: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm.cmd run smoke:settings; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:business; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:ai; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:cases; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:tasks; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:reports"
scripts.smoke:headed: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "npm.cmd run smoke:settings:headed; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:business:headed; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; playwright test tests/ai-smoke.spec.ts tests/ai-candidates-smoke.spec.ts --project=chromium --headed --workers=1; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:cases:headed; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:tasks:headed; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:reports:headed"
scripts.smoke:mysql:crud: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "cd .; npm.cmd run smoke:mysql:cases; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:mysql:tasks; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; npm.cmd run smoke:mysql:reports"
